emails.subject: Peoples Letter Agreement
emails.body: Peoples Letter Agreement Kay Here is my attempt to turn the term sheet into something executable. I have accepted all of William Harmon's changes except for the second paragraph under amended terms. William used the wording "The payment late payment amount is calculated...". I changed it to "The payment interest on overdue amounts is calculated..." to be consistent with the reference in the above paragraph. I don't think this changes any substance, but I defer to you. I think that is all I changed. I also added a quick intro. and a paragraph on future payments to reiterate this is only for October purchases. Neither may be necessary, let me know. I am not sure your availability tomorrow, but I would love to hear from you ASAP in the morning to get this in front of Peoples for signature. Russell Diamond is coordinating the internal Enron approvals with Global Finance, Credit and RAC. Thanks again for your help on your vacation day. Gregg

emails.subject: Re: Peoples Letter Agreement
emails.body: Re: Peoples Letter Agreement I like the changes. I forwarded it to Bill to give him one last shot, but if we don't hear from him by noon, I would go with it. From: Gregg Penman on 11/21/2000 05:00 PM

emails.subject: Re: Peoples Letter Agreement
emails.body: ---------------------- Forwarded by Kay Mann/Corp/Enron on 11/22/2000 10:55 AM "William J. Harmon" <wjharmon@JonesDay.com> on 11/22/2000 09:43:30 AM
